title: cordiera obtusa
intro: Cordiera obtusa, also known as Ipecacuanha, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Traditionally, the roots of the plant have been used for their medicinal properties, which include emetic and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, treating digestive problems, and reducing fever. Cordiera obtusa is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder for use in herbal remedies.
